emails.subject: 98-1600 & 98-6725 Needing K's
emails.body: 98-1600 98-6725 Needing K's Daren, I hate to be a pest but here's the deal on the above two meters: 98-1600 Sitara deal #159194 expired on 2/29/2000. The flow for 2/2000 was on the 215K. This meter (del.) flowed 53.863 for 3/2000. There is no new deal referenced, nor is the evergreen flag in effect. 98-6725 Sitara deal #214948 expired 3/27/2000. No evergreen and no new deal referenced. This is a little premature but this meter is active monthly and I'm thinking that it will flow for this month with no K being applied. Thanks -Jackie- 3-9497

emails.subject: Re: 98-1600 & 98-6725 Needing K's
emails.body: Re: 98-1600 98-6725 Needing K's Mtr 1600- A deal already exists for this meter (#159194). If you view the meter in MOPS you can see the deal. (It had zero volume before today.) Mtr 6725 This gas is traded on the spot market, so there is no deal to put in. D Jackie Young 04/06/2000 10:15 AM
